title: Nasdaq 100 Soars as Chipmaker Rebound Overshadows Iran War

title: London Stock Exchange to Introduce Nonstop Trading Next Year
title_cn: 伦敦证券交易所将于明年推出不间断交易
summary: The London Stock Exchange will open a new venue outside of its regular market hours, a move to offer “near-continuous trading” and better compete with the 24/7 trading provided by alternative platforms.

title: London’s 24-Hour Trading Is Unlikely to Revive Market, GAM Says
title_cn: GAM 表示伦敦 24 小时交易不太可能重振市场
summary: The London Stock Exchange’s plan to introduce nearly 24-hour trading for equities may fall short of reviving the bourse’s fortunes, the head of GAM Investments’ global equities team said.

title: Indian Refiners Halt Iraq Oil Loadings as Hormuz Risks Escalate

title: Gold and Silver Rise on Dip-Buying as Traders Weigh Fed Strategy
title_cn: 交易员权衡美联储策略，黄金和白银因逢低买盘而上涨
summary: Gold and silver rose on dip-buying, as traders monitored Middle East tensions for signs that higher energy costs could stoke inflation, putting pressure on the Federal Reserve to tighten policy.

title_cn: 卖空者加大对HelloFresh首张债券的押注
summary: Bets against HelloFresh SE’s debut bond, issued only three weeks ago, have surged after its trading got off to a rocky start earlier this month.

title: Colombia, Peru Send Early Policy Signs to Extend Election Rally

summary: Investors are finding fresh reasons to buy Colombian and Peruvian assets as the countries’ newly elected presidents deliver early signals that their market-friendly agendas will translate into policy overhaul.

title_cn: InMobi 任命摩根大通和 Jefferies 进行近 10 亿美元的 IPO

title: Biotech IPOs Outperform AI Listings, Leading US Market in 2026

summary: The biotechnology sector is stealing the US IPO market thunder from artificial intelligence-related listings, delivering standout returns as bankers line up a steady stream of summer debuts.

title: Saudi Crude Flow From Red Sea Hit Record Before Houthi Warning

title: LA’s $1.2 Billion Graffiti Towers Cleared to Exit Bankruptcy

summary: The bankrupt $1.2 billion Oceanwide Plaza project in Los Angeles, dubbed the Graffiti Towers after taggers spray-painted the abandoned complex, has been cleared for sale and possible completion more than seven years after the original Chinese developer ran out of money.

title: Chinese Oil Tanker U-Turns in Red Sea After Houthi Attack Threat
title_cn: 中国油轮在胡塞武装袭击威胁后在红海掉头

title: Shale Trades Go-Go Days of Growth for Output Creep

summary: US drillers are letting production rise again — just not the way they used to.

title: Z.AI to Use Only Chinese AI Chips at New Giant Data Center
title_cn: Z.AI将在新巨型数据中心仅使用中国AI芯片
summary: Z.AI has completed construction of a major data center that it plans to fill only with Chinese-made chips, a step forward in Beijing’s efforts to shift away from restricted Nvidia Corp. silicon for future AI development.

title: Google Expands in Miami After Its Billionaire Founders Buy Homes
title_cn: 谷歌在其亿万富翁创始人购买房屋后在迈阿密扩张
summary: Alphabet Inc., has more than quadrupled its office space in Miami this year shortly after co-founders Larry Page and Sergey Brin bought homes in the area.

title: Bessent Says US to Scrutinize Chinese AI Models for IP Theft
title_cn: Bessent 称美国将审查中国人工智能模型是否盗窃知识产权
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US will carefully examine open source artificial intelligence models from China for signs of intellectual property theft, amid concerns that a new wave of lower-cost Chinese competitors may sweep aside the top American models.

title: Tesla’s Problem Is Opposite of Big Tech: Not Enough AI Spending
title_cn: 特斯拉的问题与大型科技公司相反：人工智能支出不足
summary: After hearing Tesla Inc.’s seemingly countless promises about artificial intelligence, autonomous driving and robotics, Wall Street wants the company to start putting its money where its mouth is.

title: $100 Million Bet on Venezuelan Fintech Cashea Draws Global Investors

title: Samsung Debuts AI-Powered Health Assistant, Joining Packed Market
title_cn: 三星推出人工智能健康助手，加入拥挤的市场
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. is rolling out a new AI-powered assistant that acts as a virtual health companion, joining a growing number of tech companies using chatbots to deliver personalized wellness insights to its users.Samsung Health Assistant pulls in data from the user’s Galaxy smartphone, smartwatch or smart ring, the company said Tuesday. The firm also announced a series of other features coming to its health platform, particularly around heart metrics.

title: China’s World AI Conference and TSMC’s Arizona Investment Mark Wins for Leaders

title: Data Centers on Track to Suck Up a Fifth of US Power Use by 2035
title_cn: 到 2035 年，数据中心有望吸收美国五分之一的用电量
summary: Data centers in the US will account for about 20% of the nation’s electricity consumption in 2035, up from 5.9% today, according to BloombergNEF.

title: Dating Apps Face Scam Challenge of AI-Powered ‘Chatfishing’
title_cn: 约会应用程序面临人工智能驱动的“聊天钓鱼”诈骗挑战
summary: Dating-app companies won’t touch the problem, or don’t know how.

summary: Giant venture capital firm Andreessen Horowitz has hired defense and space technology investor Connor Love, adding a military veteran and prominent VC to a team focused on startups critical to US interests.

title: TSMC to Hike Chip Prices by Up to 10% in 2027, Nikkei Says
title_cn: 日经新闻称台积电将于 2027 年将芯片价格提高最多 10%
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. has held discussions with clients about chipmaking price increases of as much as 10% in 2027 to cover the rising cost of manufacturing, the Nikkei reported, citing people with knowledge of the matter.

title: BlackRock, Hillhouse, Temasek Said Set to Back Innolight Listing

summary: BlackRock Inc., Hillhouse Investment and Temasek Holdings Pte are set to be among cornerstone investors in the potential $8 billion listing by Zhongji Innolight Co. in Hong Kong, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Samsung Hires Ex-Boston Dynamics Executive in Robotics Push

summary: Samsung Electronics Co. has hired one of South Korea’s leading robotics executives from Hyundai Motor Group to oversee a new robotics division, escalating competition in a sector emerging as the next battleground among global technology companies.

title: UBS Trading Desk Says Buy Momentum Stocks as Selloff Nears End

summary: The sharp selloff in momentum stocks may be nearing its end, creating an opportunity for investors to start rebuilding positions in artificial intelligence and semiconductor shares, according to UBS’ trading desk.

title: China AI Sensation Moonshot’s Gamble on Big Models Pays Off
title_cn: 中国AI Sensation Moonshot对大模型的赌博获得了回报
summary: Crowds rushed to an obscure corner of China’s premier tech summit, moving past monumental booths from Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and Tencent Holdings Ltd. to catch a glimpse of the hottest name in domestic AI.

title: Trump’s Election Demands Get Test in Arizona Primary Races
title_cn: 特朗普的选举要求在亚利桑那州初选中得到考验
summary: President Donald Trump wants GOP lawmakers to back his plan to scrutinize the November midterm elections, echoing unfounded complaints he still makes about his 2020 defeat. Arizona’s primaries on Tuesday are the first test of whether that message is energizing Republican voters.

title: Ann Widdecombe Repeatedly Hit on Head With Hammer, Prosecutors Say
title_cn: 检察官称安·维德科姆多次用锤子敲击头部
summary: A British man appeared in court for the first time accused of murdering ex-Conservative Party minister Ann Widdecombe by hitting her 21 times over the head with a hammer.

title: Ukraine Hammers Putin’s Economy With Strikes on Giant Warehouses
title_cn: 乌克兰袭击巨型仓库重创普京经济
summary: Ukrainian drone strikes on warehouses operated by Wildberries, Russia’s answer to Amazon, have jolted the country’s retail industry, forcing companies to rethink logistics and stoking fears of higher inflation.

title: Thames Water Creditors Pitch Golden Share for UK Government
title_cn: 泰晤士水务债权人为英国政府提供黄金份额
summary: Thames Water’s senior creditors are proposing to give the UK government more control over the utility in a bid to avert any move by new Prime Minister Andy Burnham to nationalize the firm.

title: Israel Withdraws Troops From Lebanon Towns in Test of Truce
title_cn: 以色列从黎巴嫩城镇撤军以测试停战
summary: Israeli troops have withdrawn from parts of southern Lebanon under a US-mediated ceasefire agreement, which aims to keep Iran-backed Hezbollah away from the Israeli border and end nearly five months of conflict.

title: Azerbaijan Says Germany and Russia Held Secret Ukraine Meeting
title_cn: 阿塞拜疆称德国和俄罗斯举行乌克兰秘密会议
summary: Azerbaijani President Ilham Aliyev said former senior German and Russian officials met in the capital Baku this month for talks on how to end Russia’s war against Ukraine, confirming media reports.

title: CIBC Says Trump’s New Tariff Marks Start of Tough USMCA Talks
title_cn: CIBC 称特朗普的新关税标志着艰难的 USMCA 谈判的开始
summary: President Donald Trump’s latest tariff threat against Canada marks “the starting point” for potentially difficult negotiations on the North American trade deal, analysts at Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce said.

title: Burnham Urges Fiscal Discipline in First UK Cabinet Meeting
title_cn: 伯纳姆在第一次英国内阁会议上敦促财政纪律
summary: Andy Burnham pledged fiscal discipline in his first cabinet meeting as UK prime minister, while repeating his promise to ease the cost of living for millions of voters.

title: Supreme Leader More Involved in Iran’s Strategy, President Says
title_cn: 总统称最高领袖更多地参与伊朗战略
summary: Iran’s president said new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei, who’s yet to make a public appearance since replacing his assassinated father in March, is becoming more involved in directing the government’s strategy.

title: DOJ Can Give Biden Tapes to Conservative Group, Court Says
title_cn: 法院称，司法部可以将拜登录音带交给保守派团体
summary: A federal appeals court cleared the way for a conservative group to obtain copies of interviews Joe Biden privately recorded years ago for his memoir, denying the former president’s request for a temporary block.

title: India Protests Pressure Modi as Opposition Slams Police Action
title_cn: 印度抗议向莫迪施压，反对派猛烈抨击警方行动
summary: Pressure is mounting on Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s government a day after police used tear gas and batons to block thousands of protesters from marching on India’s parliament, leaving dozens of injuries on both sides.

title: Turkey’s Deposed Opposition Leader to Create Breakaway Party
title_cn: 土耳其被废黜的反对党领袖将创建脱离党
summary: Turkey’s deposed main opposition leader Ozgur Ozel announced that he will establish a new political party in a bid to mobilize an opposition reeling from internal strife.

title: UK Gas Price Surge Erodes PM Burnham’s Energy Bill Savings
title_cn: 英国天然气价格飙升侵蚀了首相伯纳姆节省的能源费用
summary: New Prime Minister Andy Burnham’s moves to reduce household electricity bills are set to be undercut by a recent surge in wholesale energy prices related to the US-Iran war.

title: Thames Water Announces Hosepipe Ban After Record Heat Waves
title_cn: 泰晤士水务公司在创纪录的热浪后宣布禁止使用软管
summary: Troubled Thames Water is introducing a temporary hosepipe ban for customers living in and around London, following three record-breaking heat waves this summer.

title: Darline Graham Running for Senate as Trump Seeks to Put Mark on Congress
title_cn: 特朗普寻求在国会留下印记，达林·格雷厄姆竞选参议员
summary: Lindsey Graham’s sister Darline Graham is running to replace him at Trump’s urging.

title: Hungary Prosecutors Seize Orban Party’s Servers, His Ally Says
title_cn: 欧尔班党的盟友称，匈牙利检察官扣押了他的服务器
summary: Prosecution investigators seized e-mail and communication servers of the opposition Fidesz party of Viktor Orban, the former prime minister’s spokesperson was quoted as saying.

title: China Slams Japan Defense Chief Over Defiance of Nuclear ‘Taboo’
title_cn: 中国谴责日本防卫长官无视核“禁忌”
summary: China criticized Japan’s defense minister for calling for more rigorous debate over Tokyo’s nuclear-weapons policy, a stance that Beijing sees as threatening regional peace and stability.

title: US-Iran Strikes Extend to 10th Day as Houthis Threaten Ships
title_cn: 胡塞武装威胁船只，美伊袭击延长至第十天
summary: The US and Iran exchanged strikes for a 10th consecutive day even as mediators sought to revive a truce, while the Houthi militant group in Yemen threatened shipping in the Red Sea.

title: Poland Pushes Ahead With 3% Digital Tax Plan Despite US Threats
title_cn: 尽管美国威胁，波兰仍推进 3% 的数字税计划
summary: The Polish government is moving ahead with a plan to put a 3% levy on digital companies such as Alphabet Inc.’s Google, Meta Platforms Inc. or Alibaba Group Holding Ltd., despite threats of retaliation from the US.

title: Burnham’s Rebel UK Cabinet Sends a Tricky Message
title_cn: 伯纳姆的反叛英国内阁发出了一个棘手的信息
summary: The new UK prime minister’s allies insist the appointments represent all factions and regions.
